title: SFL - First Quarter 2026 Results Presentation
author: Na
description: SFL Corporation Ltd. announced preliminary financial results for Q1 2026 and increased its quarterly cash dividend to $0.22 per share. The company held its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on May 11, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced an increased quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 per share, which signals financial strength, profitability, and confidence in future cash flows. Dividend increases are typically viewed positively by investors as they indicate the company's ability to return capital to shareholders.

title: SFL - First Quarter 2026 Results
author: Na
description: SFL Corporation announced Q1 2026 preliminary results with total operating revenues of $174 million and reported net income of $26 million. The company increased its quarterly cash dividend to $0.22 per share, marking the 89th consecutive quarterly dividend. Key highlights include strong tanker performance, a $170 million drilling contract for the Hercules rig, and $250 million in refinancing for two rigs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance with $174 million in operating revenues, increased dividend payout to $0.22 per share (89th consecutive quarter), secured a significant $170 million drilling contract, and successfully refinanced $250 million in credit facilities. These indicators suggest operational strength, financial stability, and shareholder-friendly capital allocation.

title: SFL - Successful Placement of a Senior Unsecured Sustainability-linked Bond Tap Issue
author: Sfl Corporation Ltd.
description: SFL Corporation Ltd. has successfully completed a tap issue of USD 75 million of its 2030 senior unsecured sustainability-linked bonds, priced at 103.5% of par. The total outstanding amount under these bonds is now USD 225 million, with net proceeds intended for general corporate purposes. Danske Bank and Arctic Securities acted as joint bookrunners.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company successfully raised USD 75 million through a tap issue at a premium price (103.5% of par), indicating strong investor demand and confidence. The company maintains a track record of consistent quarterly dividends since 2004 and has a diversified fleet supporting long-term cash generation.

title: SFL - Fourth Quarter 2025 Results Presentation
author: Na
description: SFL Corporation Ltd. (NYSE: SFL) announced it will release preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 11, 2026, along with a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share. The company will host a presentation to discuss the results.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine earnings release and dividend declaration with no indication of positive or negative performance. The dividend payment of $0.20 per share is maintained, suggesting stable operations, but without actual financial results disclosed, sentiment remains neutral.

title: SFL - Third Quarter 2025 Results Presentation
author: Sfl Corporation Ltd.
description: SFL Corporation plans to release its preliminary third quarter 2025 financial results on November 11, 2025, and will host a presentation discussing the results, including a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share.
